data.body: AC-3 evidence (green macos-latest runs on the io test path). The macos-latest CI job runs 'Run the default suite (Python tiers + bash collector)', which includes tests/interfaces/store/test_event_append_transient_retry.py (the io/transient-retry path). Consecutive green Verified+1 macos-latest runs on that path: (1) change 512 (the _git_add transient-retry fix itself) run 29130494468 -> Verified+1; (2) change 509 (adds the exact macOS EINVAL regression case) run 29136241501 -> Verified+1; (3) change 509 patchset re-run 29138793066 -> Verified+1. All three green, all exercised the io test path on macos-latest, all merged to main. The originally-flaky test_benchmark_commit_count_is_ceil_per_pass and the transient-retry suite (now including test_single_write_retries_macos_einval_add_failure) pass green on macos-latest across these consecutive runs. The macOS EINVAL signature 'unable to create temporary file: Invalid argument' now self-heals via the _git_add retry (event_append.py:181-211) instead of red-lighting CI.
